channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Glass in underpass, 22nd March
item.description:
In underpass underneath A40 near GCHQ
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucester Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Denied access through slate mill farm, 22nd March
item.description:
The gates to slate mill farm. Was not allowed to continue through farm on footpath. Informed that footpath does not go through farm.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Leigh, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped items, 22nd March
item.description:
Box of cladding at the corner of Midwinter Avenue and Elmfield

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26,28,30,32, Elmfield Avenue, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of Litter, 22nd March
item.description:
Bags of litter by the public bin on the crossroads

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Goldsmith Road, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain cover sinking, 22nd March
item.description:
The drain cover is sinking by the bus stop and lights. As you drive over it, it clangs loudly and can damage tyres and suspension
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Princess Elizabeth Way, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sink holes, 22nd March
item.description:
Loads of sinks holes about to appear as the tarmac has sunken a lot in several areas leading up to speed bumps
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 209, Arle Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Raised repairs to pavement, 22nd March
item.description:
The junction of Thirlestaine Road and College Lawn

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandford Road, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: White cupboards fly tipped, 22nd March
item.description:
White cupboards fly tipped on corner of Laxton road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lobleys Drive, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Flytipping (not witnessed and no evidence likely)

item.title: Illegal parking across two junctions, 22nd March
item.description:
This car has been parked since last night (approx. 16 hours now) blocking two junctions (hayfield way x may hill drive & hayfield way x ashlea meadow). It was accompanied by a blue Mercedes as well earlier. There is plenty of space to park on the other side of the road a few meters down in line with the other cars parked on hayfield way. This car is causing an obstruction and has led to two near misses that I’ve witnessed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): May Hill Drive, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cushions fly tipped in Bath Terrace car park, 22nd March
item.description:
These items have been left outside the back of number 13 Commercial Street’s garden.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bath Terrace, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3ft long pothole, 22nd March
item.description:
Opposite Worlds End in Prior Norton GL29LS

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Lane, Norton, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is missing, 22nd March
item.description:
Between 64 and 66 Stanway road. A large tree was cut down several years ago and replaced with a dead stick. The stick was removed after that and several months ago a new tree was put in its place. This has now been removed by the council about a week after being put in. Any idea why?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 65, Stanway Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Failed pothole repair by crossing, 22nd March
item.description:
The pothole that was repaired by the zebra crossing has failed and sunk again. This needs to be fixed and the council refunded for the first job as it was not good enough the first time around as it failed within a week.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hatherley Lane, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on pavement outside Thirlstaine House, 22nd March
item.description:
This graffiti, near the corner of Thirlstaine Rd and Bath Rd, has been here for weeks. Please could it be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thirlestaine Road, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping furniture at top of Laxton road, 22nd March
item.description:
Someone has left large items and it has not moved, it happened yesterday

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lobleys Drive, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Flytipping (not witnessed and no evidence likely)

item.title: Graffiti on pavement on Shurdington near corner of Edward Street, 22nd March
item.description:
This graffiti has been around for weeks, outside K Nine Grooming. Please could it be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Shurdington Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on pavement at corner of Painswick Rd and Shurdington Rd, 22nd March
item.description:
Please could this graffiti be removed. It’s been here for weeks and I haven’t been able to find that a race is planned.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Shurdington Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on pavement at junction of Moorend Park Road and Shurdington Road, 22nd March
item.description:
This has been around for weeks. Please could the graffiti be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Park, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on pavement on corner of The Park and Merestones Road, 22nd March
item.description:
These markings have been here for weeks and I’ve investigated whether they are any races but it appears not.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Park, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tagging in bus shelter, 22nd March
item.description:
This is the bus shelter on Church Road outside Swindon Village Primary school used by children and their parents. Please can this horrible tagging be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Church Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
